markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX as a content partner for Strella's new SEO/AEO channel.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strella needs a "zero-to-ten" partner** to build a new organic channel post-Series A, requiring full execution due to internal bandwidth limits.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**GrowthX offers a two-phase model:** an 8-week Strategy Sprint ($30k) to build foundational artifacts and publish \~10-20 articles, followed by a 12-month Growth Execution ($15k/mo) for daily editorial content.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [**The $15k/mo plan is limited to editorial content;** advanced workstreams like programmatic SEO or custom tools cost an additional $9k–$15k/mo each.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [**A Q1 2025 start date is a major blocker** for Strella, who feels "behind" and needs to launch the channel sooner.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=1917.0)

## Topics

### Strella's Need for a Growth Partner

  - [**Context:** Strella, a B2B SaaS for B2C customer insights, recently closed its Series A.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**Goal:** Use Series A funds to establish predictable, scalable growth channels beyond current founder-led sales and word-of-mouth.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**Requirement:** A partner to build the organic content channel from scratch ("zero to ten") because internal bandwidth is insufficient for a platform-only approach.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**ICP:** B2C companies (CPG, tech) with 150–2,000 employees in the US.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [**Target Roles:** Product, UX Research, Market Research, Consumer Insights, and Design teams.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [**Competitors:**](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
      - [**Direct:** Listen Labs, Outset (Series A).](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
      - [**Keyword Targets:** Maze, UserTesting, Dovetail (large authority scores).](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)

### GrowthX's Partnership Model

  - [**Pitch:** An end-to-end partner providing strategy, content creation, publishing, and AI visibility monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
      - [**Phase 1: 8-Week Strategy Sprint ($30k)**](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
          - [**Goal:** Create foundational artifacts (personas, brand guides) to feed AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
          - [**Deliverables:** \~10-20 published articles and a 12-month execution roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
          - [**Off-Ramp:** Strella can opt out at the end of the sprint, keeping all deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
      - [**Phase 2: 12-Month Growth Execution ($15k/mo)**](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
          - [**Goal:** Daily editorial content publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
          - [**Includes:** AI visibility monitoring (e.g., Profound, Scrunch), which Tyler estimated at \~$3k/mo if purchased separately.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)

### Scope & Pricing Clarification

  - [**The $15k/mo plan is for editorial content only.**](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [**Advanced Workstreams:** Programmatic SEO, custom tools (e.g., calculators), or new site sections require an additional $9k–$15k/mo per workstream.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [**Exception:** Programmatic work can be included in the $15k/mo plan if Strella provides the engineering/design support to build the initial CMS structure.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)

### Strella's Decision Factors

  - [**Primary Blocker: Timeline**](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=1917.0)
      - [**GrowthX Availability:** Earliest kickoff is Q1 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
      - [**Strella's Urgency:** Feels "behind" and needs to launch the channel sooner.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=1917.0)
      - [**Impact:** This timeline makes GrowthX a less viable option than a competitor offering an earlier start.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=1917.0)
  - [**Secondary Factor: Cost**](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
      - [The $30k sprint cost and $15k/mo execution fee are key figures for David to discuss internally with Priya.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Send meeting recording and post-call resources to David.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [**David:** Share recording and notes with Priya to evaluate GrowthX against other agencies, weighing the Q1 2025 start date against the partnership's value.](https://fathom.video/share/gojjUpovHyRsH9d5MESJANnTf7ZkqTMR?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
